summary: Reviewed 2 changed file(s) across 2 diff chunk(s). Auth chunk is safe. Logging chunk exposes credentials in logs.

findings.title: Do not log authorization headers
findings.message: The new structured log payload includes the raw Authorization header. That leaks credentials into application logs and violates the clean-code standard.
findings.suggestion: Remove the authorization field from the log payload or replace it with a fixed boolean/redacted marker.
